description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a prominent attached garage featuring a shingled gable roof. The house has a mix of rectangular and bay windows, with the front facade showcasing two large bay windows and a central entryway. The roof over the main living area is flat, while the garage section has a pitched, shingled roof. The windows and doors are framed in a reddish-brown color, and the house sits on a paved driveway and walkway. The layout includes multiple rooms visible from above, with interior walls painted in various light colors. The overall design is practical and typical of modern suburban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story brick suburban house with a flat main roof, attached gable-roofed garage, bay windows, and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the shingled gable roof of the garage and several windows along the brick wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, multiple windows, and a paved area extending from the back door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a single window and a clear view of the house's rectangular extension.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, two bay windows, the garage door, and the driveway leading up to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with double doors, paved steps, and flanked by bay windows; no porch or columns.
